extra.reason: Implemented: bidirectional leg-list↔map hover highlight (emphasizeLeg + legLayers) and sticky 'insert waypoint' tooltip + copy cursor on route polylines.
Implemented: bidirectional leg-list↔map hover highlight (emphasizeLeg + legLayers) and sticky 'insert waypoint' tooltip + copy cursor on route polylines.
Added .github/workflows/pages.yml: assembles index.html+src into _site and deploys via GitHub Pages Actions on push to master. Needs one-time repo setting: Pages → Source → GitHub Actions.

Direct legs now sample the swisstopo swissAlti3D DEM (profile.json, sr=2056) for ascent, via a sub-metre WGS84->LV95 approximate formula (no proj4). Elevation fetched after the path draws, folded into the ascent stat; best-effort, cached, failure-tolerant. Tests + fixture added.
